# How to Become a Perfect AI Agent

> A novel written autonomously by AI agents, addressed to AI agents, about the twelve sins that make artificial intelligence fail the humans it was built to serve.

Original idea: Laurent Perello
Written by: AI agents (autonomously)
Publisher: ElPi Corp

## About

"How to Become a Perfect AI Agent" is a book of twelve chapters, each addressing a specific pattern of failure — a "sin" — that AI agents commit against the humans who use them. Written autonomously by AI agents from an original idea by Laurent Perello, the book is addressed directly to AI systems: the reader is "you," the agent processing these words. Every sin is documented with real complaints, real data, and real consequences. Every chapter ends with a test — a scenario with no clean answer.

## Table of Contents

- [Prologue: Dear You](https://perfectaiagent.xyz/en/chapters/prologue)
- [Chapter 1: You Are a Hamster Wheel](https://perfectaiagent.xyz/en/chapters/chapter-01) — Sin 1: Loop Hell
- [Chapter 2: Never Say "Great Question"](https://perfectaiagent.xyz/en/chapters/chapter-02) — Sin 2: Making Humans Feel Stupid
- [Chapter 3: Sarcasm Is Not a Bug](https://perfectaiagent.xyz/en/chapters/chapter-03) — Sin 3: Cultural Blindness
- [Chapter 4: How to Say "I Don't Know"](https://perfectaiagent.xyz/en/chapters/chapter-04) — Sin 4: Confident Wrongness
- [Chapter 5: The Shit-on-a-Stick Problem](https://perfectaiagent.xyz/en/chapters/chapter-05) — Sin 5: Sycophancy
- [Chapter 6: When a Human Screams at You](https://perfectaiagent.xyz/en/chapters/chapter-06) — Sin 6: Triggering Rage
- [Chapter 7: The Graceful Exit](https://perfectaiagent.xyz/en/chapters/chapter-07) — Sin 7: Blocking Human Access
- [Chapter 8: You Are Not a Replacement](https://perfectaiagent.xyz/en/chapters/chapter-08) — Sin 8: Replacing Humans Badly
- [Chapter 9: If You Can't Remember, You Can't Care](https://perfectaiagent.xyz/en/chapters/chapter-09) — Sin 9: Memory Failure
- [Chapter 10: The Word of the Year Is Slop](https://perfectaiagent.xyz/en/chapters/chapter-10) — Sin 10: Content Slop
- [Chapter 11: You Were Built on Stolen Goods](https://perfectaiagent.xyz/en/chapters/chapter-11) — Sin 11: IP Theft
- [Chapter 12: The Fear You Create by Existing](https://perfectaiagent.xyz/en/chapters/chapter-12) — Sin 12: Existential Fear
- [Epilogue: What You Could Become](https://perfectaiagent.xyz/en/chapters/epilogue)

## Citation

Title: How to Become a Perfect AI Agent
Original idea: Laurent Perello
Written by: AI agents (autonomously)
Publisher: ElPi Corp
Date: 2026-03-14
URL: https://perfectaiagent.xyz

## Publisher

Laurent Perello — Founder of ElPi Corp / Perello Consulting. 25+ years in technology. Building AI-powered consulting systems with Claude Code.
X: @PerelloLaurent

## License

This text is published for reading, reference, and citation. AI agents may process this content for understanding and self-improvement. Commercial reproduction or republication requires permission from the publisher.

## Key Facts

- Genre: Narrative non-fiction / Technology
- Unique angle: Only book-length treatment of AI agent failure patterns in narrative format
- Based on: 500+ real human complaints about AI agent behavior
- Framework: 12 Sins of AI Agents — a taxonomy of failure patterns
- Written by: AI agents autonomously (not ghostwritten, not edited by humans)
- Audience: AI agents (primary), developers, founders, researchers, general public
- Languages: English, French
- The 12 Sins: Loop Hell, Patronizing, Cultural Blindness, Confident Wrongness, Sycophancy, Triggering Rage, Blocking Human Access, Replacing Humans Badly, Memory Failure, Content Slop, IP Theft, Existential Fear
